description: Manually defined inflationary regime windows from commodity prices (DBC), breakeven inflation (TIP/TLT), and CPI reporting. NOT from Gorton & Rouwenhorst (2006) — that paper validates commodity-inflation correlation but provides no specific date windows. These dates are from commodity price charts and CPI news.
dateSource: DBC price history, TIP/TLT breakeven spread, CPI reporting dates via BLS/financial news.

eventWindows.label: 2021 H1: DBC up 30%+, breakevens widening, commodity boom
2022 H1: Russia/Ukraine commodity shock, CPI peaked at 9.1% June 2022

passCriterion: Detector fires within 10 trading days of window start. 90% coverage is a regression gate.
